violations.text: At the time of inspection, an employee certified in food safety when not on site as required at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per the owner, employee certification recently expired and is to recertify. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is licensed/registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the establishment Certified Food Safety Manager. Application printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. Employee to submit application upon completion of Food Safety Course. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The following in-use utensils were observed improperly stored... - Cups are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Cups were removed at the time of inspection. - Knives are being stored in an unclean area (between equipment edges) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Knives were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES were observed not stored inverted at the food prep area. SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES shall be kept in the original protective PACKAGE or stored by using other means that afford protection from contamination until used (stored inverted). Items inverted for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the clean equipment storage shelf below the back prep table were observed to have an accumulation food residue and debris. Non-food contact surfaces are to be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude the buildup of debris and to prevent possible contamination of clean equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application printed for PIC at the time of inspection. Application to be submitted as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

Knives are being stored in an unclean area (between equipment edges) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Knives were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

The cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
The door to the outside was observed propped open. The outer openings must be protected from pest entry. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The cutting boards on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. PIC stated new one will be purchased. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
